title: Gourmet Argentinian Beef Sushi
description: A crowd-pleasing Argentinian style beef sushi that pairs tender seared beef with a vibrant green salsa, shaped like nigiri for a fresh paleo-friendly bite.
instructions: Season beef slices with salt, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil; rest for 10 minutes at room temperature.
Heat a cast-iron skillet over high heat; sear beef slices 1-2 minutes per side until caramelized and just cooked through.
While beef rests, combine parsley, cilantro, garlic, lemon juice, avocado, cucumber, bell pepper, and green onion in a bowl to make a green salsa; season with a pinch of salt.
Slice beef into bite-size wedges, using the same skillet if desired for extra flavor.
To assemble, place a small amount of salsa on a plate; lay a beef wedge atop the salsa, forming a mini nigiri shape.
Repeat the assembly for remaining beef slices, arranging them on a serving platter.
Garnish the platter with a sprinkle of fresh parsley and cilantro and a few sesame seeds if desired.
Serve immediately with a side of lime wedges for squeezing over the beef sushi.
